title: August 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 22''' is the 234th day (235th on leap years) of the year. There are 131 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Mark Siegel]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Rick McCallum]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Stephen Stanton]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Richard Armitage]] is born.
*1971 – [[Earl Kress]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 17|''Star Wars'' (1977) 17]] published. The cover date is November.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 78|''Star Wars Weekly'' 78]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 62|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 62]] published.
*[[1991]] – [[Madison Lloyd]] is born.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 33|''Star Wars'' (1998) 33]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 19|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 19]] published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Crossroads]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2011]] – [[Studio Colorido]] founded.
*2011 – [[Trigger, Inc.]] founded.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 1: The Republic Goes to War]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.50]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – "[[Duel of Destiny]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Neil Hanvey]] dies.
*[[2018]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 20|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 20]] published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 23|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 23]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars: Ahsoka|''Ahsoka'']] premiers with "[[Part One: Master and Apprentice]]" and "[[Part Two: Toil and Trouble]]" on Disney+.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Phase II Vol. 2 – Battle for the Force]]'' published.
<noinclude>
